title: SQL parameterized queries mandatory
content: All SQL queries must use parameterized queries to prevent injection attacks

title: Repository pattern for data access
content: Use repository pattern to abstract data access layer from business logic

title: Sprint velocity baseline 40 SP
content: Team velocity stabilized at 40 story points per sprint after 3 sprints

title: Test coverage drop after refactor
content: Coverage dropped from 85% to 72% after auth module refactor

title: Deploy pipeline blue-green strategy
content: Using blue-green deployment for zero-downtime releases on Kubernetes

title: Team onboarding 30-60-90 plan
content: New developers follow 30-60-90 day plan with buddy system

title: PBI acceptance criteria in Given-When-Then
content: All PBIs must have acceptance criteria in GWT format before sprint planning

title: Context window optimization via domain routing
content: Memory search can be accelerated by routing queries to relevant knowledge domains first

title: OWASP Top 10 check in security pipeline
content: Security attacker agent checks OWASP Top 10 vulnerabilities in every PR

title: Microservice boundary at domain aggregate
content: Microservice boundaries align with DDD aggregate roots

title: Sprint planning underestimation pattern
content: Team consistently underestimates tasks involving auth module by 40%

title: Integration tests use TestContainers
content: All integration tests must use TestContainers for database isolation

title: Terraform modules for each environment
content: Separate Terraform modules for dev, pre, pro environments with shared modules

title: Pair programming for complex auth changes
content: Auth module changes require pair programming due to security sensitivity

title: Feature discovery with JTBD framework
content: All new features go through Jobs-to-be-Done analysis before specification

title: Vector search fallback chain essential
content: Hybrid search must always fall back to grep when vector index unavailable

title: XSS vulnerability in user profile page
content: Stored XSS found in user profile bio field, missing HTML sanitization

title: ADR for every architecture decision
content: Architecture Decision Records required for decisions affecting 3+ services

title: Sprint retrospective action item tracking
content: All retro action items tracked in dedicated register with owner and deadline

title: E2E tests with Playwright screenshots
content: All E2E tests must capture screenshots for visual regression detection
